entities.name: Seal of God / Seal of the True and Living God

attributes.purpose: To perform operations, see divine vision

entities.raw_quote: Concerning the composition of the Seal of the True and Living God.

entities.name: Shem Ha-Meforash / Semenphoras
entities.raw_quote: great name of the Lord Shem Ha-Meforash of seventy-two letters.

entities.name: El / Ely / Eloy
entities.raw_quote: write the name of God El and sub nomen aliud Dei, scilicet Ely.

entities.name: Casziel
entities.raw_quote: write this name of the holy angel, which is Casziel.

entities.name: Samael
entities.raw_quote: Then in the next Samael... The angel Samael said to Solomon.

entities.name: Raphael / Anael / Michael / Gabriel
entities.raw_quote: postea Anael, postea Michael, postea Gabriel.

entities.name: Narath / Libarre / Libares / Lialg / Ueham / Yalgal
entities.raw_quote: scribatur hoc nomen sanctum Dei: Narath.

entities.name: Vos / Duynas / Gyram / Gram / Aysaram / Alpha / Omega
entities.raw_quote: in the next side to the right of the same third heptagon this name: Duynas.

entities.name: On / Adonay / Saday / Sother / Christus (Χρς)
entities.raw_quote: in the other under the fourth cross again On.

entities.name: Solomon
entities.raw_quote: Inspirante Domino dixit Salomon: Vnus est [et] solus Deus.

entities.name: Pentagon / Heptagons / Circles / Crosses

attributes.colors: Red pentagon, Azure heptagon, Purple third heptagon, Black circles

entities.raw_quote: First make a single circle... Then below that circle make another circle.

entities.name: Blood of Mole / Turtledove / Hoopoe / Bat
entities.raw_quote: written with the blood either of a mole, a turtledove, or hoopoe, or of a bat.

entities.name: Virgin Parchment (Calf / Foal / Deer)
entities.raw_quote: formed on virgin parchment, either from a calf, foal, or deer.

entities.name: Suffumigation Ingredients (Amber / Musk / Aloe / Labdanum / Mastic / Frankincense / Pearls)
entities.raw_quote: suffumigetur hoc sigillum ambra, musco, aloe, lapdano albo et rubeo.

entities.name: New Gloves (without chalk)
entities.raw_quote: habeas cirothecas novas sine creta factas.

entities.name: Prayer of Consecration
entities.raw_quote: That you, O Lord, through the annunciation, the conception... that you would deign to bless and consecrate this most holy name.

summary: This chunk details the construction, coloring, and consecration of the Seal of the True and Living God. It specifies geometric layouts (circles, pentagon, heptagons), divine and angelic names to be inscribed, materials for writing (specific animal bloods), and ritual requirements for the practitioner (abstinence, penance).
key_passages: First make a single circle, whose diameter is three fingers (on account of the three nails of the Lord)... or else 5 (for the five plagues)
But in the operations it must be done otherwise, because it should be written with the blood either of a mole, a turtledove, or hoopoe, or of a bat
First he must perform true penance and confession. He must separate himself from women, and from seeing them.
That you, O Lord, through the annunciation, the conception... that you would deign to bless and consecrate this most holy name and your seal
And thus is completed this sacrosanct seal, whose first heptagon designates the 7 orders, whose second designates the seven twofold events
